title: Northwest Advanced Bio-Fuels Solves Aviation Industry Financing Dilemma Allowing for Widescale Use of Sustainable Synthetic Aviation Fuel
content: Northwest Advanced Bio-Fuels (NWABF), the developer of one of the United States' largest woody biomass sustainable synthetic aviation fuel (SAF) facilities, announced a breakthrough financing structure that removes a long-standing barrier in the renewables industry in the United States: access to Engineering Services Development Capital (DEVCAP). This new financing model unlocks developer access to DEVCAP with lender repayment guarantee that eliminates perceived investor risk for pre-construction funding.
author: Analysts Account
